name: Jutha Maritime Public Company Limited
summary: Jutha Maritime Public Company Limited, together with its subsidiaries, provides marine transportation services. It operates in two segments, Time Charter Service and Cargo Shipping Business. The Time Charter Service segment manages fleets covering routes in Europe, the United States, Central America, the Caribbean Sea, and Australia. The Cargo Shipping Business segment offers liner services on the route between Thailand-Japan-South Korea-Thailand; and tramps services with no fixed route or time table, as well as sailing to ports in Asia, Europe, and the United States. The company engages ship management services and owns multi-purpose vessels, as well as transportation services. The company was founded in 1976 and is headquartered in Bangkok, Thailand.
